channel.title: Console Gaming on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Console Gaming on MinWeb

item.title: Why the Era of Cheap PlayStation Consoles Is Over
item.description: Discover why the reliable cycle of falling PlayStation console prices has ended and understand the economic shifts changing the cost of modern gaming hardware.

item.title: Sony Increases PS5 and Pro Prices: What You Need to Know
item.description: Sony has announced significant price hikes across its entire PlayStation 5 lineup; find out what these increases mean for gamers and why costs are rising.
